This family consists of around 95 genera and over 1,600 species. Lisianthius baltae itself is a species within the genus Lisianthius, which belongs to the Gentianaceae family. The genus Lisianthius is a part of the larger clade that includes other flowering plant families such as Apocynaceae and Rubiaceae. The classification of Lisianthius baltae is a part of the broader system of plant taxonomy.
